headline: The Stock Market Is Getting Volatile—Finally. What to Put on Your Buy List.
summary: The VIX has jumped as investors reassess AI spending, interest rates, and economic growth. That could create opportunities in semiconductor, industrial, and homebuilder stocks.

headline: Can Arista's Advanced Networking Platform Meet the Growing AI Demand?
summary: ANET rolls out 7060XE7 Series Ethernet platforms, delivering 1.6 Tbps per port and up to 100 Tbps switching capacity to meet surging AI infrastructure demands.
